headline: CINF Outperforms Industry, Trades Near 52-Week High: Time to Exit?
summary: Cincinnati Financial's pricing discipline, premium growth and investment income support long-term growth, while catastrophe losses and rising claims costs remain risks.

headline: THG Outperforms Industry, Trades Near 52-Week High: Time to Exit?

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Arch Capital Group, Raises Price Target to $110
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Bob Huang   maintains Arch Capital Group (NASDAQ:ACGL) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $105 to $110.
